Pressure Area Care.name: Medstrom Aria Flex
Pressure Area Care.description: Discover the advanced semi-dynamic support surface that offers immediate protection from pressure ulcers and behaves like a dynamic mattress, even in non-powered mode.
keyFeatures: Even in non-powered mode, the Medstrom Aria Flex provides adjustable immersion and envelopment due to cell-in-cell and valve technology.
2.5cm super-soft, shear friendly, visco-elastic foam layer above the immersive cells achieves high levels of envelopment and comfort.
The optional control unit can be added quickly and easily, provides greater flexibility for 'stepping up' or 'stepping down'.
A therapeutic pressure profile is maintained at all times without any intervention from the caregiver.

tabDescription.title: Superior Protection with Adaptive Therapy
content: The Medstrom Aria Flex solution stands out for all patient risks, offering superior protection compared to foam mattresses and traditional hybrids in non-powered mode. Its advanced design ensures a higher level of safety and comfort.

When patient assessments indicate a need for enhanced therapy, the Medstrom Aria Flex can easily adapt by incorporating the optional control unit. This feature significantly streamlines the process, ensuring patients receive the appropriate product promptly.

technicalInfo.label: Therapy options
technicalInfo.value: Alternating low pressure and continuous low pressure

technicalInfo.label: Max inflate
technicalInfo.value: One-button, reverts back to therapy after 20 minutes
